description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical red can with a metallic finish, featuring the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo prominently displayed on its side. The can is made of aluminum and has a standard pull-tab opening on the top, which is slightly recessed. Nutritional information, barcodes, and recycling symbols are printed in white and green on the back, along with a volume indication of 330 ml. The surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and giving the can a sleek appearance. The can's design includes additional branding elements and small graphics, such as a green and white certification mark and a stylized ribbon. The overall look is vibrant and instantly recognizable as a classic Coca-Cola beverage container.
description: A glossy red aluminum Coca-Cola can with white script logo, nutritional labeling, and a pull-tab top. The can is sleek, cylindrical, and highly recognizable.
description_view_0: The back of the can shows nutritional labeling, barcode, and recycling information in white and green on a red background.
description_view_1: The side prominently displays the large white Coca-Cola script logo and a small green and white certification mark.
description_view_2: This view highlights the Coca-Cola logo and a stylized ribbon, with minimal text and a clean red surface.
description_view_3: The back view again shows detailed nutritional information, barcode, and volume marking, with the logo partially visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A large, white Coca-Cola script logo is visible on the side of the can, occupying most of the vertical space. The logo is highly recognizable and contrasts with the red background.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information is visible on the back of the can, including energy, sugar, fat, and salt content, as well as a barcode and recycling symbols.
